title: Circulated Letters in MCF year 2026
contentHtml:
Circulated Letters in MCF Year 2026
RBE-No. Sub. Railway Board/Other Railway Letter No. Date circulated letter in MCF on date 

Download

RBE-No. 01

 Committee for selection of Instructors/Trainers in Training Institutions. 2025/E(Trg.)/41/39  02.01.2026 21.01.2026 View/Download
RBE-No. 02 Retention of Railway accommodation by Railway officers/staff on deputation to National Capital region transport Corporation (NCRTC). E(G) 2019 RN 2-7  06.01.2026 21.01.2026 View/Download
RBE-No. 03 Engagement of Ex-Servicemen as Pointsman on contract basis against vacancies until availability of regularly appointed candidates. E(NG)II/2021/RC-4/1  09.01.2026 21.01.2026 View/Download
RBE-No. 04 Committee for selection of Instructors/Trainers in Training Institutions. 2025/E(Trg.)/41/39  13.01.2026 21.01.2026 View/Download
RBE-No. 05 Amendment to para 124 of IREM, Vol. I.  E(NG)I/2025/PM1/20  19.01.2026 11.02.2026 View/Dwonload
RBE-No. 06 Recruitment to non-gazetted posts-equivalence on the minimum educational qualification. E(NG)II/2025/RR-1/67  19.01.2026 21.01.2026 View/Download
RBE-No. 07 Railway Services (Pension) Rules, 2026. D-43/9/2022-F(E)III  20.01.2026 21.01.2026 View/Download
RBE-No. 08 Compassionate Ground Appointment (CGA)-cases of children born to second wife of deceased railway employee. E(NG)II/2023/RC-1/1/CR  21.01.2026 04.02.2026 View/Download
RBE-No. 09 Eligibility for taking membership of Professional Institutes/Societies and reimbursement of membership fee on pro-rata basis for officials in the last year of service. E(G)2025/FE1/1  30.01.2026 04.02.2026 View/Download
RBE-No. 10 Grant of benefit of one increment under Rule 13 of RS (RP) Rules, 2008 on promotion from Sr. Goods Guard to Sr. Passenger Guard-Further clarification. PC-VI/2025/CC/05  02.02.2026 04.02.2026 View/Download
RBE-No. 11 Engagement of retired State Government officials in exigencies of services in projects where land acquisition is involved. E(NG)II/2020/RC-4/2(Pt.2)  03.02.2026 04.02.2026 View/Download
  Clarification regarding eligibility of Persons with Benchmark Disabilities for reservation in recruitment. 2025-E(SCT)I/133/10  16.01.2026 21.01.2026 View/Download
  Discontinuation of practice of presenting Gold plated Silver Medals retiring Railway officials. 2026/E(W)/40/01  28.01.2026 04.02.2026 View/Download
RBE-No. 12 General Departmental competitive Examination (GDCE) for filling up of 25% net direct recruitment quota vacancies in Group 'C: categoriesExtension of currency upto 31.03.2028. E(NG)I/2020/PM1/9  10.02.2026 11.02.2026 View/Download
  Counting of the period of service of Open Line Causal Labour and Project Casual Labour before attaining Temporary Status as qualifying service for pensionary benefits on absorption in regular employment on Railway. E(NG)II/2017/ECR/CL/4  21.01.2026 13.02.2026 View/Download
  Revival of Senior Scale ad-hoc promotion to Group B officers on Indian Railway. 2025E(GC)16-8  27.01.2026 13.02.2026 View/Download
  Nomination of Liaison Officer for SCs/STs in Zonal Railways/Production Units at the level of JA Grade Officer. 2020-E(SCT)I/34/I  09.01.2026 13.02.2026 View/Download
  Salary Account Package for all Central Government Employees. 2025/E(W)/40/10  27.01.2026 13.02.2026 View/Download
  Reiteration of instructions posting of staff in Reservation Cell and functioning of Liaison Officers for SC/ST/OBC. 2020-E(SCT)I/34/I  14.01.2026 13.02.2026 View/Download
  Conduction disciplinary inquiry through video conferencing-adhering to prescribed guidelines of GSR No. 286 (E) and GSR No. 287 (E). 2026/V-1/DAR/13/1  14.01.2026 13.02.2026 View/Download
  Revival of Senior Scale ad-hoc promotion to Group B officers on Indian Railway. 2025E(GC)16-8  27.01.2026 13.02.2026 View/Download
